plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Summary

**Bug found:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7.

### The Problem
```typescript
// BUGGY — `- 1` stops the loop one iteration too early
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {
```

For an array like `["hello", "world", "foo"]`, the loop only runs for indices `0` and `1`, skipping the last element `"foo"` entirely.

### The Fix
```typescript
// FIXED — processes every element including the last
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

**Only one file changes:** `src/utils.ts`, line 7 — remove `- 1` from the loop condition.

**No test changes needed** — the existing test suite in `tests/utils.test.ts` already has correct assertions covering multi-item, single-item, two-item, and empty-array cases. All 6 tests will pass once the fix is applied.
